interfaces.name: getHomePageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the homepage including featured services, plans, seasonal highlights, and trust indicators.

interfaces.name: getServiceCategories
interfaces.description: Return all service categories for navigation and the Services List page.

interfaces.name: getServiceListFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for the Services List page for a given category or all services.

interfaces.name: listServices
interfaces.description: Search and list services with filters and sorting. Used for Services List and search results.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Full-text search query, e.g., 'drought tolerant front yard installation'

interfaces.name: getServiceDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific service, including expanded category, features, and yard sizes.

parameters.name: serviceId
parameters.description: Service.id for the detail page action

interfaces.name: getMaintenancePlanListFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Maintenance Plans listing page.

interfaces.name: listMaintenancePlans
interfaces.description: List maintenance plans with filters and sorting for the Maintenance Plans page.

interfaces.name: getMaintenancePlanDetail
interfaces.description: Get full detail of a maintenance plan for comparison and selection.

interfaces.name: getBookableServiceCategories
interfaces.description: Get service categories that contain services bookable online, for the Booking page category dropdown.

interfaces.name: getBookableServicesForCategory
interfaces.description: List bookable services for a given category for the Booking page service selector.

interfaces.name: getAvailableTimeSlots
interfaces.description: Get available time slots for a given service and date on the Booking page.

interfaces.name: createBooking
interfaces.description: Create a booking for a bookable service with selected date, time slot, and customer details.

interfaces.name: getPackageBuilderServiceOptions
interfaces.description: Search services that can be added to a custom package in the Package Builder.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Optional search text, e.g., 'lawn mowing', 'hedge trimming'

interfaces.name: getActiveCustomPackage
interfaces.description: Get the current in-progress custom package and its items for the Package Builder.

interfaces.name: addServiceToActiveCustomPackage
interfaces.description: Add a service with a given frequency to the currently active custom package and recalculate the estimate.

parameters.name: serviceId
parameters.description: Service to add to the package

interfaces.name: updateCustomPackageItemFrequency
interfaces.description: Update the frequency of a specific service item in the active custom package and recalculate the estimate.

interfaces.name: finalizeCustomPackageForReview
interfaces.description: Finalize the active package for review, storing a target price range and marking it ready for review.

interfaces.name: getCustomPackageReview
interfaces.description: Get the package summary for the Package Review page, including validation against service count and price range.

interfaces.name: saveCustomPackageForCheckout
interfaces.description: Save the configured custom package and mark it ready for checkout.

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Optional user-friendly name for the package

interfaces.name: addCustomPackageToCart
interfaces.description: Add a saved custom package to the cart as a single line item, preparing it for checkout.

interfaces.name: listPromotions
interfaces.description: List active promotions and promo codes for the Promotions page.

interfaces.name: addServiceToCart
interfaces.description: Add a service to the cart, creating the cart if needed.

interfaces.name: addMaintenancePlanToCart
interfaces.description: Add a maintenance plan to the cart, typically from the plan detail page.

interfaces.name: getCartSummary
interfaces.description: Get the current cart contents and pricing summary for the Cart page.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a cart item and recalculate totals.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove a cart item and recalculate totals.

interfaces.name: applyPromotionCode
interfaces.description: Apply a promo code to the current cart and update totals.

interfaces.name: createOrderFromCurrentCart
interfaces.description: Create a pending order from the current cart and prepare for the Checkout page.

interfaces.name: getCheckoutSummary
interfaces.description: Get order summary, including items snapshot and totals, for the Checkout page.

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: If omitted, use the most recent pending order

interfaces.name: updateOrderBillingDetails
interfaces.description: Update billing and contact details for an order on the Checkout page.

interfaces.name: setOrderPaymentMethod
interfaces.description: Set the payment method for an order on the Checkout page.

interfaces.name: finalizeOrderPayment
interfaces.description: Mark an order as paid and return confirmation details.

interfaces.name: getGalleryFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Gallery page: space types, yard sizes, and features.

interfaces.name: listProjects
interfaces.description: List projects for the Gallery page with filters and optional sorting.

interfaces.name: getProjectDetail
interfaces.description: Get full project detail for the Project Detail page, including favorited state.

interfaces.name: addProjectToFavorites
interfaces.description: Add (or toggle) a project in the single-user favorites list.

interfaces.name: getFavoriteProjects
interfaces.description: Get the current list of favorited projects for this single user.

interfaces.name: requestProjectDesign
interfaces.description: Submit a request for a design similar to a specific project from the Project Detail page.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Should include the project reference code in the text

interfaces.name: createQuoteRequest
interfaces.description: Create a quote request for services that support 'Request Monthly Quote', such as ongoing lawn mowing.

interfaces.name: createConsultationRequest
interfaces.description: Create a consultation request for services that support design or consultation, e.g., drought-tolerant installations.

interfaces.name: searchFAQArticles
interfaces.description: Search FAQ articles by keyword for the FAQ page search results.

interfaces.name: getFAQArticle
interfaces.description: Get full content of a specific FAQ article for the FAQ Article page.

interfaces.name: sendContactFormMessage
interfaces.description: Submit a contact form inquiry from the Contact page.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About page including history, mission, and trust indicators.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get the current cart or create a new one in single-user state.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recompute cart subtotal, discounts, and total after any cart mutation.

helperFunctions.name: _getActiveOrder
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get the most recent pending order for checkout operations.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateFavoriteProjectsRecord
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize the FavoriteProjects singleton record.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateActiveCustomPackage
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize the active CustomPackage in 'in_builder' status.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCustomPackageEstimate
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute totalEstimatedPrice for a custom package based on its service items.

helperFunctions.name: _validatePromotionForCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to check if a promotion applies to current cart items and compute discountTotal.

helperFunctions.name: _findAvailableTimeSlotsForServiceAndDate
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to query TimeSlot records for a given service and date, ensuring isAvailable is true.
